title: update fulcio to 1.8.5, sigstore to 1.10.4 and go to 1.25.0
body: ## Summary 1. Why: To remove CVEs: - [CVE-2025-66506](https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/2025/cve-2025-66506/) - [CVE-2026-22772](https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/2026/cve-2026-22772/) - [CVE-2026-24137](https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/2026/cve-2026-24137/) 2. What: - Upgrade fulcio to 1.8.5 to remove [CVE-2025-66506](https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/2025/cve-2025-66506/) and [CVE-2026-22772](https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/2026/cve-2026-22772/) - Upgrade sigstore to 1.10.4 to remove [CVE-2026-24137](https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/2026/cve-2026-24137/) - Upgrade go to 1.25.0 so it's compatible with sigstore ## Additional evidence Partial output from security scanner Trivy: ## Categorization - [x] security/CVE

comments.body: [NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.

> AFAIK we already looked at the CVE's and none of them actually effect our code

That’s visible already from the diff. Not a single line changed in Fulcio, and the Sigstore changes don’t contain the TUF subpackages.
